race.comment: BLUE HUMMA (1) is a gelding by Blue Point from Humma Mumma on debut who can throw a good one. He's prepared by the McArdle yard and looked handy winning a recent jumpout at Mornington. Mott booked, this looks very winnable, especially after a few key dangers coming out. MY BONNIE LASSIE (11) is one of those who remains having tried hard on heavy at Geelong latest, back to 1000m here is some query but she can be staying on. ZWASP (7) resumes with some claims, he's had a myriad of chances but has run well in some maidens that would be deeper than this, look for him late. CHAMPAGNE LADIES (9) is an All Too Hard filly who can run well on debut for the Edwards camp.
